name: @postman-cse/node-policy-action
description: Enforce Postman CS Node.js runtime policy in GitHub repositories.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && rm -rf dist && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/index.cjs && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=cjs --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --outfile=dist/cli.cjs
scripts.check:dist: npm run build && git diff --exit-code -- dist
